evals.prompt: I want to sell a Notion template for project managers. How do I price it and where should I sell it?
evals.expected_output: Pricing recommendation for a template product with platform comparison

assertions.name: pricing_range
assertions.description: Suggests a price range appropriate for templates ($19-$99) with reasoning

assertions.name: platform_comparison
assertions.description: Compares at least 2 relevant platforms (e.g., Gumroad, Lemon Squeezy, Payhip) with pros/cons

assertions.name: fee_comparison
assertions.description: Mentions platform fees and how they impact revenue

evals.prompt: How do I launch a $197 online course to my 2,000-subscriber email list?
evals.expected_output: Launch playbook with email sequence, timeline, and revenue projection

assertions.name: launch_sequence
assertions.description: Outlines a multi-day launch email sequence (tease, announce, value, urgency, last call)

assertions.name: revenue_projection
assertions.description: Provides a conversion estimate and projected revenue based on 2K list size

assertions.name: payment_plan
assertions.description: Suggests a payment plan option to increase conversions

evals.prompt: I'm selling an ebook on Kit Commerce. Should I switch to Gumroad?
evals.expected_output: Platform comparison between Kit Commerce and Gumroad for ebook sales

assertions.name: fee_comparison
assertions.description: Compares Kit's 0.6% + Stripe vs Gumroad's 10% (free) or Pro fees

assertions.name: integration_advantage
assertions.description: Notes Kit's advantage of seamless email integration if already using Kit for newsletters

assertions.name: discovery_tradeoff
assertions.description: Mentions Gumroad Discover as a potential advantage for discoverability
